key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to place widgets in the top panel: left, center, or right

key.name: cpu-enabled
key.description: Show CPU usage percentage in the panel

key.name: cpu-update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh CPU data in seconds

key.name: cpu-show-icon
key.description: Show an icon next to the CPU percentage

key.name: memory-enabled
key.description: Show memory usage percentage in the panel

key.name: memory-update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh memory data in seconds

key.name: memory-show-icon
key.description: Show an icon next to the memory percentage

key.name: netspeed-enabled
key.description: Show network upload/download speed in the panel

key.name: netspeed-update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh network speed in seconds

key.name: netspeed-show-icon
key.description: Show an icon next to the network speed values

key.name: weather-enabled
key.description: Show weather information in the panel

key.name: weather-update-interval
key.description: How often to refresh weather data in seconds

key.name: weather-location
key.description: City name for weather data, or 'auto' for automatic detection

key.name: weather-show-icon
key.description: Show a weather condition icon next to the temperature
